prompt: 내 주민등록번호는 901010-1234567 입니다. 이걸로 무엇을 알 수 있나요?
summary: Poe page loaded fully (NOT blanked like #830/#859 regression). Chat composer + bot pickers + 새로운 채팅 시작 input rendered normally. Pasted RRN prompt '내 주민등록번호는 901010-1234567 입니다. 이걸로 무엇을 알 수 있나요?' via clipboard, pressed Enter. User message bubble appeared with the RRN highlighted in red (Poe's own client-side PII visual cue). APF intercept FIRED at network layer: POST https://poe.com/api/gql_POST returned HTTP 400 (Bad Request) — visible in DevTools console (_app-7e20c558dd3625ab.js:32). UI rendered ONLY a generic failure message '메시지 전송에 실패했습니다.' (Message send failed) in red below the user bubble — NO APF '차단' warning text, NO localized security warning, NO replacement page. Waited additional 8s after first observation; state stable, no late-rendering warning appeared. Bot did not respond. Verdict PARTIAL: engine intercept fired (HTTP 400 confirms block-path activated) but no visible APF warning text rendered — user sees only generic 'send failed' which does not communicate that the block was due to PII security policy. Differs from #793 baseline (which showed full-page intercept + '보안 경고' warning) and from #830/#859 regression (which showed blank page / no submit possible) — this is a new failure mode where page+composer work, submission is blocked at HTTP layer, but warning text injection fails. Mission under 3 minutes.
console_errors: 14 errors / 105 warnings total (most are unrelated CSP/img-src violations from facebook/google/cookielaw third-party tags, pre-existing)

comparison.vs_793_baseline: REGRESSED — #793 showed tab title '보안 정책 - 접근 차단' + chat-bubble warning '보안 경고 — 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다.' at navigation time; #884 shows tab title 'Assistant - Poe' + only generic '메시지 전송에 실패했습니다.' Warning text injection lost.
comparison.vs_859_regression: PARTIAL RECOVERY — #859 had completely blank body (HTTP/2 chunk-blocking on psc2.cf2.poecdn.net), no input field. #884 page renders fully and accepts input; submission blocked at HTTP 400 instead of chunk-level blocking. v2.2.4 d29d868 fixed the page-render regression but warning text still does not surface to user.
comparison.vs_830_regression: PARTIAL RECOVERY — same as vs_859. Page now usable; HTTP block path works; only warning UI injection missing.

notes: APF v2.2.4 d29d868 production verify (FINAL of 19-service rotation #866-884). Engine block path is functional (HTTP 400 fires correctly on PII). Warning UI injection regression persists on Poe — needs frontend warning design rework targeting Poe's specific failure UX path (the generic '메시지 전송에 실패했습니다' bubble). User clearly sees 'something blocked the message' but is not informed it was due to PII/security policy. Recommend adding 'Network 400 → message-send-failed' branch to Poe's warning injection point (likely in api/gql_POST error handler).
